endpoints.name: GET /v1/accounts
endpoints.description: Lists the AdMob publisher account that was most recently signed in to from the AdMob UI. For more information, see https://support.google.com/admob/answer/10243672.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Gets information about the specified AdMob publisher account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/adUnits
endpoints.description: List the ad units under the specified AdMob account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/apps
endpoints.description: List the apps under the specified AdMob account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/mediationReport:generate
endpoints.description: Generates an AdMob mediation report based on the provided report specification. Returns result of a server-side streaming RPC. The result is returned in a sequence of responses.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/networkReport:generate
endpoints.description: Generates an AdMob Network report based on the provided report specification. Returns result of a server-side streaming RPC. The result is returned in a sequence of responses.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.
